channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Super Typhoon Bavi Brings Catastrophic Winds and Evacuations to East Asia
item.description: Super Typhoon Bavi, a Category 5 equivalent storm, is making landfall in the Northern Mariana Islands with winds reaching 285 km/h, prompting mass evacuations and travel suspensions across East Asia. ...

item.title: Australia's Economic Outlook: Rate Cuts, Petrol Prices, and Market Reactions
item.description: The article discusses recent developments in Australia's financial landscape, including potential early interest rate cuts by major banks, rising petrol prices, and the impact of a Telstra network out...

item.title: Hockey player transitions to writing to inspire others
item.description: The article profiles a young woman who discovered her identity and purpose through the sport of hockey but has since shifted her focus to writing as a means of inspiring others. Her journey highlights...

item.title: GOP Campaign Volunteer Resigns After Past Criminal Record Comes to Light
item.description: Andrew Havas, a volunteer for Sen. Jon Husted's campaign, resigned after his past criminal record involving a minor was revealed. The campaign accepted his resignation, citing his history of pleading ...

item.title: Cleophas Malala Addresses Accusations of Secret Ties with President Ruto
item.description: Cleophas Malala, deputy leader of the Democracy for Citizens Party, has dismissed allegations that he is secretly working with President William Ruto. In an interview with Amaica Media, Malala called ...

item.title: Catastrophic flooding hits Missouri as historic rains trigger rescue operations and widespread damage
item.description: A state of emergency has been declared in Missouri following unprecedented rainfall that triggered catastrophic flooding, submerging entire communities and forcing dramatic rescue efforts. The deluge,...

item.title: Typhoon Bavi Brings Heavy Rain and Strong Winds to Northern Taiwan
item.description: Typhoon Bavi has intensified, bringing heavy rainfall and strong gusts to northern Taiwan as it moves towards China. The storm, which formed in the Philippine Sea, has caused significant disruption, w...

item.title: Former Colleague Criticizes Todd Blanche's Transformation Under Trump
item.description: Mimi Rocah, a former federal prosecutor and colleague of Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche, expressed shock and disgust at his transformation under the Trump administration. In an interview with Jo...

item.title: Texas Bakery Faces Backlash After Criticizing MAGA Movement
item.description: A Texas-based bakery, Hive Bakery in Flower Mound, has sparked national attention after posting a critical message on Facebook about the MAGA movement. The post, which expressed embarrassment with the...

item.title: FIFA Anti-Discrimination Report Highlights Anti-Gay Incidents at 2026 World Cup
item.description: A recent FIFA anti-discrimination report has revealed troubling incidents of homophobia during the 2026 World Cup qualifiers, sparking global outcry. The document, released by FIFA's Ethics Committee,...

item.title: Motorcyclist charged after resisting police arrest in Gungahlin incident
item.description: A 20-year-old motorcyclist has been charged with multiple offences after resisting arrest during a confrontation with police in Gungahlin. The incident occurred on July 10 when officers observed a bla...

item.title: Senior KDF Officer Convicted for Murder of Family at Laikipia Airbase
item.description: A Nairobi High Court has convicted former Kenya Defence Forces Major Peter Mugure Mwaura for the murders of his wife Joyce Syombua and their two children at the Laikipia Airbase. The ruling marks the ...

item.title: Safa's Coaching Decision to Shape Bafana's Future
item.description: The article discusses the critical decision facing South African football as the South African Football Association (Safa) prepares to appoint the next head coach for Bafana Bafana. Hugo Broos, who ha...

item.title: Batanes Officials Reaffirm Philippine Sovereignty Over Province Amid Chinese Claims
item.description: Batanes Governor Ronald Aguto Jr. and Itbayat Mayor Joseph Cultura have firmly rejected claims by Chinese scholars asserting the province belongs to China, reaffirming its long-standing status under P...

item.title: IOC and FIFA Reject Olympic Peace Prize Amid Controversy
item.description: The International Olympic Committee (IOC) and FIFA have officially rejected the proposal for an Olympic Peace Prize, a decision that has sparked significant debate among international sports organizat...

item.title: Kate Hudson's Family Vacation on the Amalfi Coast
item.description: Kate Hudson, 47, has been enjoying a family vacation on the Amalfi Coast, showcasing her toned figure in a revealing G-string bikini. The actress, known for her role in the sports-comedy series 'Runni...

item.title: Paris Paloma Advocates for Human Artists and Charitable Causes at Bilbao BBK Live 2026
item.description: Paris Paloma, the indie-folk singer-songwriter, used her performance at Bilbao BBK Live 2026 to address the growing debate around artificial intelligence and its impact on the arts. During her set at ...

item.title: Man Arrested Over Death of Former UK Minister Ann Widdecombe
item.description: A 26-year-old white British man has been arrested on suspicion of murdering 78-year-old former UK minister Ann Widdecombe, who was found dead in her rural Devon home. Police confirmed there is no evid...

item.title: Assam faces severe teacher shortage in 7,948 government schools
item.description: Education Minister Ranoj Pegu revealed that 7,948 government and aided schools in Assam do not meet the ideal 30:1 pupil-teacher ratio. The Unified District Information System for Education (UDISE+) d...

item.title: B.C. Woman Launches Petition to Stop Funding Federal Opposition Leader's Home
item.description: A British Columbia woman, Carole Burman, has initiated a petition to halt federal funding for the home of the federal opposition leader. The petition, which gained traction in political circles, targe...
